classification_rationale: Mechanism diagnosis from #2752 shows 2/3 hard slices are scenario insufficiency (one high confidence), and the third is ambiguous but switching did not produce clearance. No further topology-reselection parameter tuning is expected to clear the current hard-slice set.
recommended_next_actions: local_policy_scoring for t_intersection_transfer to separate blocked_geometry from switch_too_often

rejected_alternatives.reason: Three thresholds produced identical outcomes per slice; gate parameter is not the limiting factor.
No hard slice cleared; mechanism diagnosis shows scenario insufficiency for 2/3 slices.
Marginal progress gain on bottleneck_transfer (6.1m vs 5.2m) but still horizon_exhausted; no gain on doorway_transfer.
Mechanism shows no_useful_topology_alternative for 2/3 slices; new config would face same geometry constraint.

negative_control.note: Negative control succeeded with zero topology switching across all candidates.

stop_rule_reason: All three hard slices remained horizon_exhausted; mechanism diagnosis classifies 2/3 as scenario insufficiency; switching on t_intersection did not produce clearance.
